metadata.description: Plugin marketplace for the intent-engineering Claude Code plugin

plugins.name: intent-engineering
plugins.description: Enforce intent engineering: software that behaves the way a reasonable developer or user expects. Five lenses (predictability, convention, simplicity, experience, architecture) for planning, plan validation, code review, and codebase audit, with project-level .intense config and architecture packs for Rails, Python, Laravel, Express, Phoenix, and React.
